recommendations.title: Brooklyn
recommendations.overview: In 1950s Ireland and New York, young Eilis Lacey has to choose between two men and two countries.

recommendations.title: We Live in Time
recommendations.overview: An up-and-coming chef and a recent divorcée find their lives forever changed when a chance encounter brings them together, in a decade-spanning, deeply moving romance.

recommendations.title: The Goldfinch
recommendations.overview: A boy in New York is taken in by a wealthy family after his mother is killed in a bombing at the Metropolitan Museum of Art. In a rush of panic, he steals 'The Goldfinch', a painting that eventually draws him into a world of crime.

recommendations.title: Closed Circuit
recommendations.overview: A high-profile terrorism case unexpectedly binds together two ex-lovers on the defense team - testing the limits of their loyalties and placing their lives in jeopardy.

recommendations.title: Intermission
recommendations.overview: A raucous story of the interweaving lives and loves of small-town delinquents, shady cops, pretty good girls and very bad boys. With Irish guts and grit, lives collide, preconceptions shatter and romance is tested to the extreme. An ill-timed and poo

recommendations.title: Auntie Edna
recommendations.overview: Taking place during the events of Incredibles 2, Edna Mode babysits Jack-Jack.

recommendations.title: Serial Driver
recommendations.overview: Pauline has her own way of doing road safety: as a trainer in a point recovery center during the day, she becomes a serial killer of drivers at night.

recommendations.title: Felon
recommendations.overview: A family man convicted of killing an intruder must cope with life afterward in the violent penal system.

recommendations.title: Jack-Jack Attack
recommendations.overview: The Parrs' baby Jack-Jack is thought to be normal, not having any super-powers like his parents or siblings. But when an outsider is hired to watch him, Jack-Jack shows his true potential.

recommendations.title: Gridiron Gang
recommendations.overview: Under the leadership of their counselor, teenagers at a juvenile detention center gain self-esteem by playing football together. Based on a true story.
